top_signals.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
top_signals.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Inside Celonis, the German tech unicorn that won over a fifth of the FTSE 100
top_signals.summary: For a company valued at more than $13bn (£9.58bn), Celonis remains relatively unknown in Britain. Founded in Munich in 2011, the software company has become one of Europe’s most valuable private tech firms, with customers including AstraZeneca, ASOS, BMW and the UK Cabinet Office. The UK has become one of its three largest markets globally. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
